package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerStringHandlingRegexpCompileInRequestPath() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_string_handling_regexp_compile_in_request_path"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: String handling. Flag regexp.Compile or MustCompile inside handlers, loops, or repeated functions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
